title: The Darkin Blade
description: Replaces the Netherite Sword with Aatrox from League of Legends.
body:
# **_Please read the Dependencies!_**
### A Simple resource pack that replaces the Netherite sword with Aatrox aka. The Darkin Blade.
## Preview Videos
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/BbJiNqYid9Q" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/Pe4a2JXOrzk" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/v5J1SA7Nz80" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

## Dependencies (Optional but recomended)
### For the best glowing effect i recomend using [Complementary Shaders](https://www.complementary.dev/shaders/).
You need to edit a file in the shaderpack for this to work.
1. Open the shaderpack with 7zip or winrar.
   
2. Navigate to the **shaders** folder and open the **item.properties** file with a text editor.
   ![A screenshot of where the item.properties file can be found](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/908153328f6bd1648da077192c87bb8aa09ac4be.png)
   
3. Press **ctrl+f** and search for **trial_key**.
   ![A screenshot of the result when searching for trial_key in the item.properties file](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/040a37d07d8cbeb6152b469c9d1d1dccc15d8839.png)
   
4. Add **netherite_sword** behind **trial_key** seperated by a space.
   ![A screenshot of how the edited file should look like](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/39755802eb821b551ad8595ba71a8a2a028837aa.png)
   
5. Save the file.

### If you dont want to or can´t use the Shader i recomend using [Continuity](https://modrinth.com/mod/continuity).
It ads a glowing effect to the sword without having to modify anything.
The effect is however less bright and pronounced.
